description: Optimal offsets from exhaustive grid search on 91,090 played-game predictions. Key insight: NEGATIVE FS offset (-0.8) makes model MORE SELECTIVE on MORE picks, keeping only elite hitters. Result: FS 56.7% both directions, PK 58.2%+ both directions. All bettable props above 54.2% profitability threshold.

metadata.grid_search_methodology: Tested every offset from -0.8 to +1.23 in 0.1 increments for FS, TB, PK, Hits. Evaluated MIN(MORE%, LESS%) per prop as optimization target. Offsets applied to raw stored projections.
metadata.key_insight: NEGATIVE offsets improve MORE accuracy by being more SELECTIVE. Only players with strong raw projections make the MORE cut. Positive offsets push too many borderline players into MORE territory, diluting accuracy.

verified_accuracies_v011.total_bases_note: TB LESS cannot be fixed via offsets (structural issue with line at 1.5). Recommend trading TB MORE only.
verified_accuracies_v011.hits_note: Model rarely picks MORE for hits (line 1.5 too high for most batters). LESS is strong.

avoid_bets: Home Runs: model broken (0% accuracy) ❌ SKIP
Hits MORE: 25% (4 picks, too few) ❌ SKIP
